title: ACPS statement on Coutts update (Alberta Justice clarification)
verification_notes: Alberta Justice / ACPS clarification statement PDF (open.alberta.ca), 2024-04-25. Added re EVT-013 / EVT-010 relation where RCMP primary release (R-017) URL remains outstanding. Allegedly issued in response to UCP misinformation about Coutts charges. Tier 1 government primary record.
